description.value:
Trigger A creature Strides more than 5 feet, Steps onto, or fights while on the slick boardwalk.

Effect The creature must succeed at a DC 15 Reflex save (or Acrobatics check to Balance) or fall prone; on a critical failure it slides off and falls 13 feet into the river (@Damage[1[bludgeoning]] from the short fall into deep water) and into the hunting grounds of the Jigsaw Shark (A12). A creature that Steps (5 ft) or moves carefully is not affected.

stealth.details: Obvious — no check needed to notice the danger.

details.description: A barnacle-slick boardwalk (A3) clings to the fishery 13 feet above shark-infested water; the old planks also groan under heavy loads (a creature heavier than Medium, or two creatures within 5 feet, may collapse a stretch — treat as the Rotten Ship Deck reaction).
details.disable: @Check[acrobatics|dc:15|name:Cross Carefully] to move along it without risk, or shore up a stretch with rope/planks (Crafting or Survival, DC 15).
